objective: Demonstrate how Mobius can help a dance studio preserve operational knowledge, coordinate staffing, monitor instructor reliability, and surface actionable improvements.
founderPrompt: Summarize Laveen Dance operations this week, identify staffing risks, and recommend the next best action.

runtime.expected: Create loop ID and execution trace.

brain.expected: Plan the request, check memory first, apply policies, and decide whether provider assistance is required.

seedRecords.title: Instructor Reliability Framework
seedRecords.summary: Instructors begin with a score of 100. No-shows, late cancellations, and negative studio feedback reduce the score. Recovery is possible through reliability, positive feedback, and consistent attendance.

seedRecords.title: Studio Operations Priorities
seedRecords.summary: Studios need reliable instructor coverage, parent communication, substitute coordination, class scheduling, and visibility into operational risks.

seedRecords.title: Laveen Demo Focus
seedRecords.summary: The demo should show how Mobius helps Laveen Dance reduce missed classes, improve staffing visibility, and create an executive dashboard for studio decisions.

successCriteria: Atlas Engineering Intelligence verifies demo readiness
Founder receives a clear operational recommendation
